authors: Peter J. Buckley, L. Jeremy Clegg, Adam R. Cross, Xin Liu, Hinrich Voss, Ping Zheng

title.zh: 中国对外直接投资的决定因素
title.en: The determinants of Chinese outward foreign direct investment

summary.zh: 研究用国际商务理论解释中国对外直接投资，尤其关注市场、资源、战略资产、制度环境和政策因素，是理解中国企业早期出海动因的经典文献。
summary.en: A foundational empirical study applying international business theory to Chinese outward FDI, with attention to markets, resources, strategic assets, institutions, and policy conditions.

authors: Randall Morck, Bernard Yeung, Minyuan Zhao

title.zh: 中国对外直接投资的若干视角
title.en: Perspectives on China's outward foreign direct investment

summary.zh: 文章从公司治理、资本配置、政府作用和制度背景讨论中国企业对外投资，对理解国有企业和国家资本主义语境下的出海问题很有价值。
summary.en: The article links outward investment to corporate governance, capital allocation, government involvement, and institutional background, useful for understanding state capitalism and SOE-related concerns.

title.zh: 中国企业海外并购的战略意图
title.en: Foreign acquisitions by Chinese firms: A strategic intent perspective

summary.zh: 以战略意图解释中国企业通过海外并购获取技术、品牌和全球渠道的路径，有助于分析并购后整合、反垄断和国家安全审查风险。
summary.en: Explains how Chinese firms use foreign acquisitions to obtain technology, brands, and global channels, linking strategy to merger integration, antitrust, and national-security review risks.

authors: Yadong Luo, Qiuzhi Xue, Binjie Han

title.zh: 新兴市场政府如何促进对外直接投资：中国经验
title.en: How emerging market governments promote outward FDI: Experience from China

summary.zh: 文章讨论政府政策、融资、信息和制度支持如何推动企业出海，也提示东道国为何会把企业行为与母国政策联系起来。
summary.en: The article studies how policy, finance, information, and institutional support promote outward FDI, while also showing why host states may link firm conduct to home-state policy.

authors: Ilan Alon, John Child, Shaomin Li, John R. McIntyre

title.zh: 中国企业全球化：理论普遍性还是中国特殊性
title.en: Globalization of Chinese firms: Theoretical universalism or particularism

summary.zh: 文章讨论中国企业国际化是否可用一般跨国企业理论解释，还是需要强调中国制度、企业所有制和发展阶段的特殊性。
summary.en: Examines whether Chinese firm internationalization follows general multinational theory or requires particular attention to Chinese institutions, ownership, and development stage.

title.zh: 什么决定中国对外直接投资

summary.zh: 文章关注资源、制度质量和投资目的地选择，适合作为讨论自然资源项目、政治风险和腐败风险的理论入口。
summary.en: Focuses on resources, institutional quality, and location choice, making it useful for natural-resource projects, political risk, and corruption-risk analysis.

title.zh: 国有所有权如何影响中国企业对外投资的所有权选择
title.en: State ownership effect on firms' FDI ownership decisions under institutional pressure

summary.zh: 研究国有背景和制度压力如何影响中国企业海外进入模式，对国资企业并购、合资和审查风险具有解释力。
summary.en: Studies how state ownership and institutional pressure affect Chinese firms' ownership choices abroad, relevant to SOE acquisitions, joint ventures, and screening risk.

authors: Karl P. Sauvant, Victor Zitian Chen

title.zh: 中国对外直接投资监管框架
title.en: China's regulatory framework for outward foreign direct investment

summary.zh: 文章系统梳理中国对外投资审批、备案、促进和监管框架，是理解母国监管与企业出海合规关系的重要文献。
summary.en: A systematic account of approval, filing, promotion, and supervision in China's outward investment regime, useful for connecting home-state regulation and firm compliance.

authors: Peter J. Buckley, Hinrich Voss, Adam R. Cross, Xin Liu, Ping Zheng

title.zh: 中国对外直接投资研究回顾与未来议程
title.en: A retrospective and agenda for future research on Chinese outward foreign direct investment

summary.zh: 文章回顾中国OFDI研究的主要问题，并提出未来研究议程，可用来组织出海研究的理论、数据和政策问题。
summary.en: Reviews the Chinese OFDI literature and proposes future research questions, useful for organizing theory, data, and policy issues in outbound investment research.

title.zh: 中国的国际投资战略：双边、区域与全球法律政策
title.en: China's International Investment Strategy: Bilateral, Regional, and Global Law and Policy

summary.zh: 著作从国际投资法和政策角度讨论中国投资战略、投资协定、争端解决和制度影响，适合连接企业出海与国际经济法。
summary.en: A book-length treatment of China's investment strategy, treaties, dispute settlement, and institutional impact, linking corporate outbound activity to international economic law.

authors: Margaret M. Pearson, Meg Rithmire, Kellee S. Tsai

title.zh: 中国的党国资本主义与国际反弹

summary.zh: 文章解释党国资本主义如何塑造外部国家对中国企业的安全担忧，是理解投资审查、供应链排除和平台审查政治背景的重要材料。
summary.en: Explains how party-state capitalism shapes foreign security concerns about Chinese firms, useful for investment screening, supply-chain exclusion, and platform scrutiny.

title.zh: 国家资本主义与国际投资法
title.en: State Capitalism and International Investment Law

summary.zh: 著作讨论国家资本主义企业和主权投资在国际投资法中的地位、义务和争端问题，对解释中企海外投资的制度性争议尤其相关。
summary.en: Analyzes state-capitalist enterprises and sovereign investment under international investment law, directly relevant to institutional controversies around Chinese overseas investment.

venue: United Nations Conference on Trade and Development

summary.zh: 报告提供全球FDI趋势、产业政策、投资便利化和可持续发展投资数据，可作为评估中国企业出海大环境的宏观背景材料。
summary.en: Provides global FDI trends, industrial-policy context, investment facilitation, and sustainable-development investment data for macro-level analysis of outbound activity.
